description.ko: 음파가 빛으로 조각되어 리듬감 있는 주파수 시각화를 통해 몰입형 감각 여정을 선사하는 오디오와 비주얼 예술의 혁신적인 융합, ECHO-0를 경험해 보세요.
description.en: Experience a revolutionary fusion of audio and visual artistry where sound waves are sculpted into light, creating an immersive sensory journey through rhythmic frequency visualization.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of abstract holographic sound waves rippling through a dark crystalline space, neon cyan and violet frequencies vibrating in fluid motion, ECHO-0 minimalist typography subtly integrated into the wave patterns, high-tech aesthetic, 8k resolution, ray tracing, immersive atmosphere.
